description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a robust, boxy silhouette and wide, flat armrests. The upholstery appears to be a dark gray fabric with a subtle, fine-lined texture, giving it a contemporary and understated look. The seat consists of two individual, thick cushions, while the backrest is divided into two matching padded sections, both seamlessly integrated into the frame. The armrests are generously padded and extend slightly outward, providing ample support and comfort. The sofa sits low to the ground, with short, block-like legs that are mostly concealed by the frame. Its overall design is minimalist and practical, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor public spaces.
description: A dark gray, two-seater sofa with wide, padded armrests and a minimalist, boxy design. It features two seat and back cushions with a subtle lined texture and low, hidden legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat cushions, with the sofa's blocky profile clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two individual seat and back cushions, wide armrests, and the overall symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest and the sofa's solid, rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, slightly curved backrest and the full width of the sofa's back panel.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, flat, and padded armrests at both ends, extending slightly outward and matching the height of the backrest, with a straight, blocky profile.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-like legs positioned at the corners, mostly hidden by the sofa frame, with no visible decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest divided into two padded sections, matching the seat cushions in width and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle, fine-lined texture, giving a slightly ribbed appearance without any decorative stitching or patterns.
